goal: Use proven sample-style opening, then switch into a stronger outer-domain factory plan after the first expansion phase.
main_idea: Do not force domain_factory from step 0. Let sample7-style opening capture early planets, then build and thicken an outer production domain from step 62 onward.
notes: This branch responds to the finding that aggressive custom opening arrows were firing but failing to capture. It preserves sample opening reliability while keeping the long-term domain-control strategy.
